display.purpose: Hero sections and big brand statements.

shadows.name: solar-glow
shadows.purpose: Energy emission effect for active elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button for the solar site.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #eab308; color: #000; padding: 20px 32px; border-radius: 16px; font-weight: 700; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ca8a04; transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.2); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.html:
HIGH EFFICIENCY

Up to 30% more power generation than standard panels.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 40px; padding: 40px; color: #fff; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.3); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; text-transform: uppercase; tracking-tight; } .ds-card-desc { color: #9ca3af; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 6px 16px; background: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.2); border-radius: 9999px; color: #eab308; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }

narrative.overview: Precision-engineered energy. High-fidelity dark mode foundations with vibrant solar accents. The design is calculated, clean, and futuristic.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Text on dark backgrounds must maintain a high contrast ratio. Always default to White or Stellar Yellow for legibility.

rules.name: The Spacing Rule
rules.body: Only use 4, 8, 12, 16, or 24px increments. No exceptions.

dos: Do use the 4px spacing system strictly
Do maintain the dark mode foundation
Do use Stellar Yellow sparingly for impact
